rationale.hitl-workflow: AI supports review; approve/reject decision stays with accountable humans
rationale.ai-review: Agents mark likely defects, suggest comments, recommend improvements
rationale.oversight-explanation: Aggregates rationale, summaries, context so reviewers can comprehend changes
rationale.framework: Agent-based AI-OS code review platform architecture, pipeline-integratable
rationale.intro-framing: Vision paper naming gap: automation loses interpersonal review benefits
